message:
feat(c_interop): Add c_interop to fast link compilation path

- Added c_interop to MODULE_OBJECTS in incremental.zig
- Added c_interop dependency for main module in fast link
- c_interop now builds as .o file for precompiled object linking

This enables c_interop to work in fast link mode, reducing compile
times for numpy/external library imports.

Note: There's a remaining type issue with string formatting when
generating f-strings with PyValue - needs investigation.
